comments.author: chatgpt-codex-connector
comments.body:
Codex usage limits have been reached for code reviews. Please check with the admins of this repo to increase the limits by adding credits.
Credits must be used to enable repository wide code reviews.

comments.author: spencerr221
comments.body: > @spencerr221 Please verify it. Thanks Validation completed — all checks passed. 1. **Boundary validation** passed: layered `layers` boundary behaves as expected (`layers=2` accepted; out-of-range values rejected with the expected `2-10` message). 2. **Related unit tests** passed: parameter validation and invalid-layer API checks in `tests/entrypoints/openai_api/test_image_server.py`. 3. **L4 regression** passed: `tests/e2e/online_serving/test_qwen_image_layered_expansion.py` succeeded under `--run-level full_model` (including `layers_guard_001_layers2`).
